rationale: The cited constitutional provision validates Tax Code §26.03 (assessment ratio) as of 1980. It does not address homestead exemption amounts under §11.13(b), so no conflict arises from increasing the exemption.
quote: Section 26.03, Tax Code, is validated as of January 1, 1980.
_note: The relevant constitutional authority for homestead exemptions likely lies in Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b or §1-c, not §1-h. This scan found no conflict with the cited provision.
